description: You are a merchandise displayer designing a custom arched door handle for a glass display case. Model a solid arched handle in FreeCAD consisting of a circular cross-section (radius 6 mm) swept along a semicircular arc path (radius 50 mm) in the XZ plane. The path is centered at the origin and spans from (-50, 0, 0) through (0, 0, 50) to (50, 0, 0). Save the FreeCAD document to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/display_handle.FCStd and export the solid to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/display_handle.step.
